title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 135.035 - Claims for calendar year 1975 and later affected
text:
135.035.  Claims for calendar year 1975 and later affected. — Sections 135.010, 135.015, 135.025, and 135.030 shall be effective with respect to claims filed for the calendar year 1975 and thereafter.
(L. 1975 H.B. 121, et al. § A)
